evidence.page_title: Map of Russian Influence in Africa - The Cyber Shafarat
evidence.title: Map of Russian Influence in Africa
evidence.description: Map of Russian Influence in Africa by Joana de Deus Pereira, Trainer at the NATO Defense Against Terrorism Center of Excellence and Senior Fellow at RUSI. Joana writes that Vladimir Putin has a lon…
evidence.text:
Map of Russian Influence in Africa by Joana de Deus Pereira, Trainer at the NATO Defense Against Terrorism Center of Excellence and Senior Fellow at RUSI.
Joana writes that Vladimir Putin has a long-planned strategy to achieve his geopolitical goals.
Moscow’s influence in Africa is inextricably linked to the Kremlin’s strategy in Ukraine. And Africa is the top priority.
Peter Nupe, former director of the International Center for Combating Terrorism said:
“The West tends to focus on Ukraine without noticing the big picture.”
Russia has become the largest arms supplier in Africa.
Russia is not isolated – it is strengthening its ties where Europe was absent and has created a network with a strong global reach. Moreover, the privatization of Russian geopolitics is no longer a mirage, but a very real threat. Now the question is how the West will react.

evidence.page_title: When Grasshopper Surpasses the Master - The Cyber Shafarat
evidence.title: When Grasshopper Surpasses the Master
evidence.description: Wagner in Mars Upset over recent revelations of Russian (Wagner PMC) atrocities committed in #Mali and elsewhere, Alexandre Ivanov falsely complains of disinformation against his organization and W…
evidence.text:
Wagner in Mars
Upset over recent revelations of Russian (Wagner PMC) atrocities committed in #Mali and elsewhere, Alexandre Ivanov falsely complains of disinformation against his organization and Wagner.
Communiqué of Alexander Ivanov, head of the PRMB, condemning Western propaganda against Russia
The head of the Commonwealth of Officers for International Security, Ivanov Alexander Alexandrovich, made a statement about propaganda information resources that slander Russian specialists and Russia.
“Instructors are accused of crimes allegedly committed hundreds of kilometers from the places where they are located,” Alexander Ivanov said in a communiqué dated February 2, 2022.
The head of the SMB also noted that the Western propaganda machine is turning on in full and is ready to come up with the most terrible lies against Russia, if only to cover up their own crimes, since these stuffing appears simultaneously with the fact that the whole country is discussing the facts of cooperation between militants and MINUSCA and French diplomats.
Finally, Alexander Ivanov demanded that the international community put pressure on those who continue to provide information and material support to the militants in the CAR.
#SOMB
INTERNATIONAL SECURITY OFFICERS COMMUNITY
At the moment we are witnessing the activation of propaganda information resources that make money by inventing news, slandering Russian specialists and Russia. The enormity of the fake news they publish is incomprehensible.
The instructors are accused of crimes allegedly committed hundreds of miles from where they are. What will they come up with next? Wagner on Mars?
And this propaganda, which is not based on any facts, appears at the same time as the whole country discusses and condemns the accusations that have appeared on television from real people, confirming the facts of cooperation between the militants and MINUSCA and French diplomats. It turns out that the Western propaganda machine is turned on to the maximum and is ready to invent the most terrible lies against Russia, if only to cover up its own crimes.
The United Nations Multidimensional Integrated Stabilization Mission in Mali (MINUSCA)
I, on behalf of COSI, demand that the international community put pressure on those who continue to provide information and material support to activists in the CAR!
Alexandre Ivanov,
Leader of the Community of Officers for International Security

evidence.page_title: حمله هوایی اسرائیل به کرمانشاه - تابناک | TABNAK
evidence.title: حمله هوایی اسرائیل به کرمانشاه
evidence.description: تصاویری از دور دوم از حملات هوایی رژیم اسرائیل به کرمانشاه منتشر شده است. دشمن صهیونی در حال هدف قرار دادن سایتهای موشکی ایران است.
evidence.text:
نبض خبر
حمله هوایی اسرائیل به کرمانشاه
تصاویری از دور دوم از حملات هوایی رژیم اسرائیل به کرمانشاه منتشر شده است. دشمن صهیونی در حال هدف قرار دادن سایتهای موشکی ایران است.
گزارش خطا
پسندها:
۷
اخبار مرتبط

تصاویر برخورد دو قطار در دانمارک با 17 مجروح

evidence.page_title: تصاویر تجاوز تازه اسرائیل و هدف قرار دادن کرمانشاه - تابناک | TABNAK
evidence.title: تصاویر تجاوز تازه اسرائیل و هدف قرار دادن کرمانشاه
evidence.description: رژیم اسرائیل در دور جدید تجاوز، پادگان امام حسن کرمانشاه و نقاطی در جاده کرمانشاه که گفته میشود لانچر موشک و چند خودروی نظامی بوده را هدف قرار داده است. تصاویری که پس از این حمله منتشر شده را میبینید.
evidence.text:
نبض خبر
تصاویر تجاوز تازه اسرائیل و هدف قرار دادن کرمانشاه
رژیم اسرائیل در دور جدید تجاوز، پادگان امام حسن کرمانشاه و نقاطی در جاده کرمانشاه که گفته میشود لانچر موشک و چند خودروی نظامی بوده را هدف قرار داده است. تصاویری که پس از این حمله منتشر شده را میبینید.
گزارش خطا
پسندها:
۳
اخبار مرتبط
